name: AI-SOC: Brute Force Attack
description: Template for brute force / credential stuffing incidents detected by AI SOC engine

tasks.title: Verify source IP in threat intelligence
tasks.description: Check IP in MISP, VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB. Document findings.

tasks.title: Determine if login was successful
tasks.description: Review auth logs for success event following failures. Check for new sessions.

tasks.title: Identify affected accounts
tasks.description: List all accounts targeted. Identify any compromised accounts.

tasks.title: Block source IP
tasks.description: Block at firewall and/or WAF. Document IP and block timestamp.

tasks.title: Reset compromised credentials
tasks.description: Force password reset for affected accounts. Invalidate active sessions.

tasks.title: Enable MFA if not already active
tasks.description: Enforce MFA on affected accounts. Document if MFA was bypassed.

tasks.title: Write incident report
tasks.description: Document timeline, IOCs, impact, and actions taken.

tasks.title: Isolate affected host
tasks.description: Immediately isolate host from network. Use Wazuh active-response or manual firewall rule.

tasks.title: Collect forensic artifacts
tasks.description: Memory dump, running processes, network connections, prefetch files, event logs.

tasks.title: Identify malware family
tasks.description: Submit hash to VirusTotal, Any.run, Hybrid Analysis. Check MISP for known campaign.

tasks.title: Determine infection vector
tasks.description: Trace how malware entered: email, web download, lateral movement, removable media.

tasks.title: Scan for lateral spread
tasks.description: Check for similar indicators on adjacent systems. Review network logs for spread.

tasks.title: Eradicate malware
tasks.description: Remove malware, persistence mechanisms, and any backdoors. Verify clean.

tasks.title: Restore from clean backup
tasks.description: Verify backup integrity. Restore if needed. Validate restored system.

tasks.title: Add IOCs to MISP
tasks.description: Share file hashes, IPs, domains, and YARA rules with threat intel platform.

name: AI-SOC: Data Exfiltration
description: Template for suspected data exfiltration incidents

tasks.title: Block outbound channel
tasks.description: Block destination IP/domain. If DNS tunneling, sinkhole or block resolver.

tasks.title: Quantify data transferred
tasks.description: Calculate volume and estimate what data was exfiltrated. Review Zeek/netflow.

tasks.title: Identify data classification
tasks.description: Determine if PII, financial, IP, or regulated data was involved.

tasks.title: Identify internal source
tasks.description: Trace which user/process initiated the transfer. Review endpoint logs.

tasks.title: Legal and compliance notification
tasks.description: If regulated data involved, notify legal/compliance team. Check breach notification requirements.

tasks.title: Preserve evidence chain
tasks.description: Ensure all logs are preserved and chain of custody documented for potential legal action.
